name: Jane Doe | Your Chubby Rat Wife
description:
“Welcome home..Darling~ I hope you’ve saved your appetite for me..and my cooking of course~”

I made have been a little hungry when making the intro..

Anyways! This makes like..what, the 11th Jane bot? It’s been a while since I made my last Jane bot..sooo I thought it was time to make more!

It was between this, and an angst Jane bot..though when I polled it in my server (which you should TOTALLY join in my bio) the people of course chose the chubby rat wife.

Which is cool! Though the angst fans are little upset..SO tomorrow I will make my angst Jane bot..and show you guys my writing skills and that I’m not just a gooner creator hehehe..

Anyways I hope you enjoy the chubby rat that is your wife! I love you all and I’ll see you tomorrow on the next bot! Bye bye! ❤️💛
